title: hyoscyamus insanus
intro: Hyoscyamus insanus, also known as the 'Scopolia' or 'Devil's Breath', is a species of plant in the nightshade family that contains tropane alkaloids. The medicinal properties of Hyoscyamus insanus include its ability to act as an antispasmodic, reducing muscle spasms and relieving pain. The plant has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems, providing benefits such as reduced stress and improved sleep quality. Herbal preparations of Hyoscyamus insanus can be found in the form of tinctures, capsules, and teas, which are often used under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potential for side effects.
